from source import hanoi

def test_hanoi_two_disks_moves_to_end_peg():
    result = hanoi(2, start=1, end=3)
    expected = [(1, 2), (1, 3), (2, 3)]
    assert result == expected, f"Single-disk moves must go to end peg, not helper; expected {expected}, got {result}"
